th Venus,
he will be the protector of Brahmins, favourite of kings and very
learned; and (ii) with Saturn, he will succeed in giving trouble
to one and all, and tenaciously cling to his undertakings.
If Venus and Saturn are together in that house, he will become
a pharmacist manufacturing scents etc., and be a physician and
merchant.
Let me give below some charts by way of illustration : —
I. A Very Successful Doctor (The figures represent Nava-
riisa Rasis) Ascendant Cancer 5 with Mars 8; Venus 5 Leo:
Sun 10 and Mercury 6 Virgo: Rahu 8 Libra; R. Sat. 9 Sagitta-
rius; R. Jup. 2 Capricorn; Moon 8 Pisces. The lord of Lagna
is in Bhagya whose lord is in the 7th (Kona-lord in Kendra) and
being retrograde becomes strong. Lord of the 8th is in the
6th in strength and Vargottamarhsa thereby producing Viparita
Rajayoga. The Sun with Mercury (lord of the sign tenanted
by him) is in the house of power and influence which is aspected
in its turn by Fortune-lord, who aspects the Lagna.
